title: Cool Items
body:
Cool Items adds some new useful items! Most of them are used in combat.

This is a just a mod I made for fun - hence why it is very low quality, and is also the first mod I made using MCreator. It's also a mod for a server I made with my friends, but you can use it too.

Current features:
- Air Powder: levitates the holder.
- Water Balloon: splashes water on impact.
- Ghost Wand: makes the user invisible for 10 seconds.
- Fireball Wand: summons a giant fireball.
- Flamethrower: bursts fire at high speeds.
- Slingshot: throws rocks (cobblestone).
- Healing Orb: heals the user by 4 hearts.
- Arson Device: as the name says.
- Summoning Staff: summons a zombie.

These are all the items in order:

![All items this mod adds](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/863953635356442645/996329421332025404/unknown.png)
